commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Messengers. Hebrew, "runners. "These officers remained at court and were people of great account, (Calmet) like the king's guards, 2 Kings xv. , and 3 Kings i. (Haydock) Lord, out of reverence, and being convinced of their innocence. (Menochius) The obedience which we owe to superiors is subordinate to that which we must always show towards God and justice. (Calmet) Saul unjustly condemned them as the abettors of his competitor. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
